notes: Changeable page descriptions, commentary, interpretations, watch items, and management text. Backend or editorial workflow should update this file in Google Drive when copy changes.

dashboard.pageDescription: Institutional dashboard for short squeeze risk, market defense, shareholder intelligence, sentiment monitoring, and capital markets decision support.

commandCenter.riskNarrative: Current market conditions indicate elevated squeeze risk driven by reduced effective float, positive sentiment, and increasing borrow pressure. Internal management adjustments suggest materially higher risk than public market estimates.
managementActions: Monitor borrow fee and share availability daily.
Review upcoming catalysts and prepare board-level talking points.
Prepare IR response package for short-pressure and rumor questions.

sections.alertCenterDescription: Meaningful changes from the last 7 days.
sections.marketPressureDescription: Short interest, borrow pressure, lending conditions, and squeeze readiness in one view.
sections.internalFloatDescription: Why management sees a different float reality than the public market.
sections.smartMoneyDescription: How institutions, insiders, and options traders are positioning.
sections.marketNarrativeDescription: Sentiment, discussion volume, and narrative momentum.
sections.forwardLookingDescription: Potential price scenarios and upcoming catalysts.
sections.aiIntelligenceDescription: Consolidated executive interpretation and recommended actions.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Executive Summary
aiIntelligence.body: CURR shows elevated market-defense risk driven by borrow pressure, internal float reduction, and constructive narrative momentum.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Risk Assessment
aiIntelligence.body: The highest risk is a catalyst occurring while borrow supply remains constrained and sentiment continues to improve.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Opportunities
aiIntelligence.body: Positive positioning, upcoming catalysts, and a lower internal float estimate create a stronger management-view risk picture than public data alone.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Recommended Actions
aiIntelligence.body: Review borrow fee daily, prepare IR response materials, and escalate material alerts to management and advisors.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Market Outlook
aiIntelligence.body: Near-term outlook remains sensitive to borrow availability, filings, ownership movement, and catalyst timing.

shortInterest.pageDescription: Short interest, borrow fee, shares available, short volume, and squeeze risk from the standardized import data pool.
shortInterest.overviewSubtitle: Executive view of short exposure, borrow pressure, available inventory, and squeeze-risk inputs.
shortInterest.shortScoreDescription: Composite short-interest risk score using short exposure, borrow pressure, share availability, and related market-pressure inputs.

currentInterpretation.headline: Borrow pressure is visible
currentInterpretation.body: Current data shows reported short shares, short interest as a percentage of float, and borrow fee pressure. This overview helps management understand whether short sellers are facing rising cost, tighter inventory, or increasing positioning pressure.

managementWatchItems: Borrow fee movement above current levels
Any decline in available shares to borrow
Short-interest increases confirmed by volume data
Days-to-cover rising with lower trading liquidity
shortInterest.trendSubtitle: Larger charts for short exposure, borrow cost, borrow availability, and reported short volume.

lendingPressure.pageDescription: Detailed borrow availability, utilization, borrow fee, and on-loan data used to evaluate short seller pressure.
lendingPressure.overviewSubtitle: Executive view of share availability, borrowing conditions, inventory utilization, and lending pressure.
lendingPressure.pressureNarrative: Borrowing conditions indicate pressure on short sellers based on available inventory, utilization, borrow fee, and borrow demand.
lendingPressure.healthyStatusNote: Available inventory remains sufficient while utilization is controlled.
lendingPressure.reviewStatusNote: Borrow conditions warrant management review and continued monitoring.
lendingPressure.borrowDemandNarrative: Current borrow activity suggests demand for available shares based on utilization, borrow fee, on-loan activity, and available inventory.
positiveContributors: Imported inventory can be monitored daily
Availability changes can quickly update pressure score
lendingPressure.aiLendingAnalysis: Current imported data indicates lending pressure. Borrow fees are visible, but available inventory remains meaningful and utilization/on-loan inputs are not yet supported by complete institutional data. Management should monitor borrow fee changes, availability drops, and future utilization feeds as primary indicators.

smartMoney.pageDescription: Institutional ownership, shareholder changes, insider activity, and options positioning research.

hero.description: Detailed ownership, insider, and options records remain below. Use this page to validate what institutions, insiders, and options traders are doing.

cards.label: Institutional Activity
cards.note: Review ownership changes and activist filings below.

cards.label: Insider Activity
cards.note: Review Form 3/4/5 style imported records below.

cards.label: Options Activity
cards.note: Review put/call and gamma files below.

marketDefense.pageDescription: Executive workflow for monitoring market pressure, preparing responses, and preserving evidence for board and IR review.

panels.title: IR Response Package
panels.description: Prepare Q&A, disclosure language, rumor response, and stakeholder messaging.

panels.title: Board Briefing Pack
panels.description: Summarize risk drivers, alerts, evidence trail, and recommended management actions.

panels.title: Advisor Coordination
panels.description: Route high-priority alerts to legal, IR, capital markets, and executive teams.
